_comment: Registry seed for the universal ontology adapter. Each entry mounts a curated golden ontology as an SMA is-a lattice + higher-order relations. merge WITHIN an ecosystem (OBO via BFO/RO), route ACROSS ecosystems (see docs/PAPER_SPINE.md sec 7).

ontologies.name: hpo
ontologies.note: phenotypes; flagship rare-disease arm; pure is-a

ontologies.name: mondo
ontologies.note: diseases; disease axis to pair with HPO phenotypes

ontologies.name: go
ontologies.note: gene function; rich RO typed relations (part_of/regulates)

cyber.description: MITRE ATT&CK (STIX 2.1). Routed ACROSS from OBO, never merged.

ontologies.name: attack
ontologies.note: techniques/tactics; second golden-ontology domain (C3); data not yet on disk
